channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government launches Kagera grid connection project with 24-month completion target
item.description: The government of Tanzania has officially launched a major electricity project aimed at connecting Kagera Region to the National Grid, with completion expected within 24 months. Energy Minister Dr Deo...

item.title: All five people rescued alive after building collapse in Durban CBD
item.description: In a remarkable operation on Saturday morning, emergency services in Durban successfully rescued all five individuals who were trapped when a single-storey building in Union Lane, Durban CBD, collapse...

item.title: Chiamaka Nnadozie up for WSL Save of the Season after stellar performance
item.description: Chiamaka Nnadozie, de Nigerian goalkeeper wey dey play for Brighton & Hove Albion Women F.C., don dey nominated for the Barclays Women’s Super League Save of the Season award. Dis na after she perform...

item.title: Leonardo DiCaprio’s Net Worth and Career Earnings Explained
item.description: Leonardo DiCaprio, the American actor and environmentalist, has built an impressive career since he started acting at age 15. As of 2026, his net worth is around $300 million, accumulated through acti...

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari Sworn in as Bengal's First BJP Chief Minister in Historic Ceremony
item.description: On 10th May 2026, Suvendu Adhikari took oath as the first Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) Chief Minister of West Bengal, marking a historic shift in the state's political landscape. The oath-taking cerem...

item.title: Calls for Royal Commission to Include Islamophobia in Its Inquiry
item.description: A letter to the editor in The Canberra Times argues that while the Royal Commission on Anti-Semitism and Social Cohesion investigates anti-Semitism, it should also give due attention to Islamophobia. ...

item.title: Pakistan’s Advanced Military Strategies and Technology in the 2025 Conflict with India
item.description: During the Marka-i-Haq conflict in May 2025, Pakistan demonstrated a wide range of advanced military capabilities against India. The confrontation, which lasted four days, saw Indian jets being downed...

item.title: Galatasaray Secure Fourth Straight Turkish League Title With Osimhen Leading Attack
item.description: Galatasaray don clinch their fourth consecutive Turkish Super Lig title after dem beat Antalyaspor 4-2 for their home ground. The Istanbul-based club show strong performance throughout the season, and...

item.title: Subrata Gupta, Retired IAS Officer, Appointed Adviser to West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari
item.description: Retired IAS officer Subrata Gupta has been appointed as the adviser to the newly sworn-in Chief Minister of West Bengal, Suvendu Adhikari. Gupta, a 1990-batch officer, had earlier served as the Specia...

item.title: One Nation Secures First Federal Seat in NSW Amid Liberal Party Decline
item.description: In a historic shift in Australian politics, One Nation has claimed the regional NSW seat of Farrer in last night's byelection, marking the first time the Liberal Party has lost the seat in 77 years. T...

item.title: Alexa Shares Her Hobbies, Favorite YFSF Moments, and Gelo’s Positive Traits
item.description: In a recent feature on 'Name Us 3,' Alexa Ilacad opened up about her personal interests, favorite moments on 'Your Face Sounds Familiar' (YFSF), and the qualities she admires in her co-star Gelo. Alex...

item.title: Moscow Holds Scaled-Back Victory Day Parade Amid Public Apathy and War Fatigue
item.description: Moscow’s annual Victory Day parade, commemorating the Soviet Union’s defeat of Nazi Germany, received a subdued response from citizens this year. Many Russians expressed frustration over mobile intern...

item.title: Comprehensive Guide to Alliance High School: Fees, Admissions, Dormitories, and Activities
item.description: Alliance High School, a national boys' boarding school in Kikuyu, Kiambu County, is one of Kenya's oldest and most prestigious secondary schools, established in 1926 by Protestant missionaries. Over t...

item.description: KARACHI: On Saturday, the Special Investigation Unit (SIU), together with a federal civilian intelligence agency, conducted two separate operations resulting in the arrests of a crystal methamphetamin...

item.title: Qatari LNG tanker makes first passage towards Hormuz Strait amid Iran-Pakistan coordination
item.description: A Qatari LNG tanker named Al Kharaitiyat departed from Ras Laffan, Qatar, and is currently sailing towards the Strait of Hormuz on its way to Port Qasim, Pakistan. Shipping data indicates this could b...

item.title: Serious injuries reported after car collides with pedestrians in Arnold, Nottingham
item.description: A serious incident occurred in Arnold, Nottingham, where a vehicle struck multiple pedestrians, leaving at least one person with life-threatening injuries. Emergency services responded promptly to the...

item.title: Two Canadians Charged in U.S. for Attempting to Smuggle Firearms into Canada
item.description: U.S. authorities announced that three men, including two Canadian citizens, have been charged in New York state for attempting to smuggle 89 firearms into Canada. The arrest occurred following a traff...

item.title: Putin says Ukraine war may be nearing an end as three-day ceasefire and prisoner swap begin
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin said on Saturday that he believes the war in Ukraine could be approaching an end. His comments came one day after Donald Trump announced a three-day ceasefire, set to ...

item.title: Okello shines as Yanga beat Coastal Union 3-0 to strengthen league lead
item.description: Young Africans S.C. (Yanga) continue to show strong form in the Mainland Tanzania Premier League after a convincing 3-0 win over Coastal Union F.C. on May 9, 2026, at the KMC Complex. Allan Okello was...

item.title: Court filings reveal timeline and evidence in D4vd murder and abuse case
